summary: PUNTO 2 Roadmap - Widget Embeddable revix-widget.js E2E Testing Complete. 23 widget tests + 8 original tests + 14 Fase 4 tests + 26 agents panel tests = ALL PASSED. Widget fully functional: chat with LLM, lead capture (MOCKED in preview), disclaimer, mobile responsive, CTA button.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/public/widget/health - Returns {ok:true, agent:'presupuestador_publico', preview:true, version:'1.0.0', service:'revix-widget'} - VERIFIED
POST /api/public/widget/chat - Sin auth, devuelve session_id, reply, disclaimer. Mantiene contexto con mismo session_id - VERIFIED
POST /api/public/widget/chat - Validación: message vacío → 422, cuerpo malformado → 422 - VERIFIED
POST /api/public/widget/lead - Requiere consent=true (400 si false), email inválido → 422, nombre <2 chars → 422 - VERIFIED
POST /api/public/widget/lead - En MCP_ENV=preview devuelve {ok:true, preview:true, mock:true, pre_registro_id:'preview-mock-*'} - VERIFIED (MOCKED)
Rate limiting por IP: chat 30/min, lead 10/min - VERIFIED (smoke test)
Widget UI: botón flotante azul abajo-derecha con data-testid='revix-widget-toggle' - VERIFIED
Widget UI: al pulsar toggle se abre panel con greeting y disclaimer visible - VERIFIED
Widget UI: al enviar mensaje aparece typing indicator y luego respuesta LLM - VERIFIED
Widget UI: tras 1 turno de usuario aparece CTA 'Quiero que me contactéis' (data-testid='rvx-cta-lead') - VERIFIED
Widget UI: form lead capture con campos nombre/email/teléfono/consent, validación inline, submit funciona en preview (mock) - VERIFIED
Widget UI: responsive móvil (390px viewport) — panel ocupa pantalla completa (390x734px) - VERIFIED
Regression: /crm/agentes panel funcional con 11 agentes - VERIFIED
Regression: Fase 4 MCP tests (14/14 passed, 1 skipped) - VERIFIED

success_rate.backend: 100% (23/23 widget + 8/8 original + 14/14 Fase4 + 26/26 agents panel = 71 passed, 1 skipped)

test_credentials.widget_public: No auth required for widget endpoints

seed_data_creation: No seed data created - widget uses preview mock mode
context_for_next_testing_agent: Widget embeddable PUNTO 2 fully tested. All endpoints working: /api/public/widget/health, /chat, /lead. Frontend widget at /widget/revix-widget.js and demo at /widget/. Lead capture is MOCKED in MCP_ENV=preview (returns preview-mock-* IDs, does NOT write to MongoDB). Rate limiting in-memory by IP. All data-testids present for automated testing. Mobile responsive verified at 390px viewport.

tests: Preview returns pre_registro_id starting with preview-mock-
All fields present (nombre, email, telefono, consent)
Validation shows error for empty name

mocked_apis.POST /api/public/widget/lead: In MCP_ENV=preview, returns mock response without writing to MongoDB. This is expected behavior, NOT a bug.

skipped_tests.reason: No catálogo de referencia (es_catalogo_referencia=True) in revix_preview DB
